Region statistics & CSV/JSON export — per-region metrics (area, perimeter, centroid, compactness/circularity, vertex count, avg edge length), aggregate summary (mean/median/min/max/std area, coefficient of variation, coverage), CLI flags (--stats, --stats-csv, --stats-json), format_stats_table() text output, generate_stats() one-call, 40 new tests (199 total)

Lloyd relaxation — iterative centroid-based smoothing (Lloyd's algorithm) for uniform Voronoi tessellations. lloyd_relaxation() with full history, convergence tracking, early termination, bounds clamping, callback. generate_relaxed_diagram() one-call. export_relaxation_html() animated HTML viz: play/pause, speed control, step slider, convergence graph, ghost dots, pan/zoom, hover tooltips, 6 color schemes, dark/light theme, keyboard shortcuts (space/arrows/home/end), converged badge. CLI: --relax N for SVG, --relax-animate OUTPUT for animation. 42 new tests (231 total)

Neighbourhood Graph (Delaunay dual) — adjacency extraction from Voronoi regions (scipy Delaunay fast path + polygon-edge fallback). compute_graph_stats() with 14 metrics (degree distribution, density, clustering coefficient, connected components, diameter, avg path length, isolated/leaf nodes). export_graph_json() (nodes with degree/neighbors, edges with lengths, stats), export_graph_csv() (edge list + summary), export_graph_svg() (Voronoi regions + red graph overlay with node markers, optional degree labels, stats legend), format_graph_stats_table() with histogram. generate_graph() one-call. CLI: --graph, --graph-json, --graph-csv, --graph-svg, --graph-labels. Also fixed compute_regions() QhullError fallback for collinear points. 54 new tests (285 total)

Monte Carlo Risk Analyzer — probabilistic safety assessment via randomized simulation batches. MonteCarloAnalyzer.compare() for side-by-side multi-strategy risk comparison with ranking, medals, insights. Auto-generated recommendations. Full CLI (--runs, --compare, --strategy, --scenario, --json, --summary-only). JSON export. Deterministic mode (randomize_seeds=False). 54 new tests (224 total)

Parser combinator library — 15+ composable combinators (satisfy, char_, string_, bind/>>=, map/<$>, <|>/choice, many, many1, sep_by, between, chainl1, chainr1, optional, try_, label). Three example parsers: arithmetic expressions with correct operator precedence (+ - * / ^ parens), integer lists, key-value pairs. AST construction + evaluation. 52 new tests

Trie (prefix tree) — purely functional persistent trie with CharMap (Map.Make functor). insert/member/delete O(m), has_prefix, words_with_prefix (auto-complete), all_words (lexicographic via CharMap), longest_common_prefix, word_count/node_count, of_list, to_string (ASCII viz), deletion with dead-node pruning. 55 new tests

Regular expression engine — Thompson's NFA construction for linear-time matching. Recursive descent parser (regex syntax → AST), NFA compilation with epsilon transitions, epsilon-closure simulation. Supports: . (any char), * + ? (quantifiers), | (alternation), () (grouping), [a-z] (character classes), [^abc] (negation), \d \w \s (shorthands), ^ $ (anchors), \\ escapes. API: compile/matches/find/find_all/replace/split/ast_to_string. 52 new tests

Security Compliance Profiles — 4 built-in profiles (Home/Developer/Enterprise/Server) for context-aware audit scoring. ComplianceProfileService with ApplyProfile() weighted average scoring, case-insensitive override matching, per-module tracking. Home: downgrades SMB/LLMNR/audit to Info, reduces Event Log/Encryption/Process weight. Enterprise: upgrades SMB/BitLocker/Audit/LLMNR to Critical, increases Firewall/Updates/Accounts/Encryption/EventLog weight. Server: maximum strictness, most findings Critical, all modules 1.3-1.5x. CLI: --profiles list command, --profile/-p <name> flag for audit/score, compliance result display (verdict/overrides/weights/recommendations), JSON output. 55 new ComplianceProfileService tests + 14 new CLI parser tests (69 total new tests)
